stat.title: Rally Killers
stat.subtitle: GIDPs with a runner on second (or worse).

notableEvents.label: Travis Bazzana rally-killer GIDP · Top 2
notableEvents.detail: Travis Bazzana grounds into a double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Liam Hicks. Steven Kwan out at 2nd. Travis Bazzana out at 1st.
